_comment: Tracker policy tuning for multi-cat target selection and identity filtering.

selection._comment: Score composition for choosing active cat track.

engagement._comment: EMA model for how responsive the active track appears to play motion.
engagement.decay_keep_comment: Per-frame passive decay for all active tracks.
engagement.response_diag_scale_comment: Normalizes motion by bbox diagonal before clamp.
engagement.response_weights_comment: Signal blend should usually sum to 1.0.

filter._comment: Temporal smoothing and identity lock behavior.
